repeated-identical-error.title: The same failed action was tried again unchanged
repeated-identical-error.whatHappened: The same recorded action failed at least twice within the next ten actions. No file change or passing check was recorded between those failures.
repeated-identical-error.whyItMatters: Trying the same failed action again without recorded progress is a useful point to change approach.
repeated-identical-error.recommendation: After the same action fails twice without recorded progress, inspect the error and change the input or approach, or record the blocker before trying again.
repeated-identical-error.claimLimit: Some failures may be deliberate tests; this does not prove the retry was unreasonable.
